attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SMGAB.GL_ACCOUNT_BALANCE_KEY        
,'Fiscal Year' BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD         
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.PERIOD_NUM AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.PERIOD_YEAR AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
,CAST(MF_OM_EX_BAL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS BK_POSTING_DT                 
,CAST(MF_OM_EX_BAL.CURRENCY_CODE AS  CHAR(3)) BK_STATED_CURRENCY_CD         
,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.BEGIN_BALANCE_CR AS CREDIT_BALANCE_AMT            
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.BEGIN_BALANCE_DR AS DEBIT_BALANCE_AMT             
,((MF_OM_EX_BAL.PERIOD_YEAR*100) + MF_OM_EX_BAL.PERIOD_NUM) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.PERIOD_NET_DR AS PERIOD_ACTIVITY_DEBIT_AMT     
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.PERIOD_NET_CR AS PERIOD_ACTIVITY_CREDIT_AMT    
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.GES_PK_ID AS SK_GES_PK_ID_INT              
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  AS SS_CD                         
,MF_OM_EX_BAL.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
(
	Select
		SMGB.BATCH_ID,
		SMGB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		SMGB.GES_PK_ID,
		SMGB.CREATE_DATETIME,
		CAST(SMGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_DR AS DECIMAL(38,7)) BEGIN_BALANCE_DR,
		CAST(SMGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_CR AS DECIMAL(38,7)) BEGIN_BALANCE_CR,
		SMGB.PERIOD_NET_DR,
		SMGB.PERIOD_NET_CR,
		SMGB.CURRENCY_CODE,
		SMGB.PERIOD_NUM,
		SMGB.PERIOD_YEAR,
		SMGB.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SMGB.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SMGB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		SMGB.ACTION_CODE
	FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_BALANCES SMGB 
	WHERE   SMGB.ACTUAL_FLAG='A' 
	        /* AND (SMGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG IS NULL OR SMGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG='Y') */ /* commented as part of CCER OCT , populting hist data from FY13 Aug onwards */
	        AND SMGB.CURRENCY_CODE<>'STAT'

	UNION ALL
	Select
		EXMOGB.BATCH_ID,
		EXMOGB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		EXMOGB.GES_PK_ID,
		EXMOGB.CREATE_DATETIME,
		CAST(EXMOGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_DR AS DECIMAL(38,7)) BEGIN_BALANCE_DR,
		CAST(EXMOGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_CR AS DECIMAL(38,7)) BEGIN_BALANCE_CR,
		EXMOGB.PERIOD_NET_DR,
		EXMOGB.PERIOD_NET_CR,
		EXMOGB.CURRENCY_CODE,
		EXMOGB.PERIOD_NUM,
		EXMOGB.PERIOD_YEAR,
		EXMOGB.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		EXMOGB.GLOBAL_NAME,
		EXMOGB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		EXMOGB.ACTION_CODE
	FROM
		 $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_GL_BALANCES     EXMOGB
)MF_OM_EX_BAL,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GL_ACCOUNT_BALANCE SMGAB
WHERE
MF_OM_EX_BAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID=NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
AND NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND MF_OM_EX_BAL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND MF_OM_EX_BAL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOB.SS_CODE
AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE  = MF_OM_EX_BAL.CURRENCY_CODE
AND NIC.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND MF_OM_EX_BAL.GES_PK_ID = SMGAB.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMGAB.SS_CD

SELECT	
SMOGB.BATCH_ID,
SMOGB.ACTUAL_FLAG,
SMOGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_CR,
SMOGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_DR,
SMOGB.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
SMOGB.CURRENCY_CODE,
SMOGB.GES_PK_ID,
SMOGB.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SMOGB.GLOBAL_NAME,
SMOGB.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SMOGB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SMOGB.PERIOD_NAME,
SMOGB.PERIOD_NET_CR,
SMOGB.PERIOD_NET_DR,
SMOGB.PERIOD_NUM,
SMOGB.PERIOD_TYPE,
SMOGB.PERIOD_YEAR,
SMOGB.REVALUATION_STATUS,
SMOGB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
SMOGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG,
SMOGB.CREATE_DATETIME,
SMOGB.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                
FROM
(
	SELECT	
	 	SMGB.BATCH_ID,
		 SMGB.ACTUAL_FLAG,
		 SMGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_CR,
		 SMGB.BEGIN_BALANCE_DR,
		 SMGB.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		 SMGB.CURRENCY_CODE,
		 SMGB.GES_PK_ID,
		 SMGB.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SMGB.GLOBAL_NAME,
		 SMGB.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		 SMGB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SMGB.PERIOD_NAME,
		 SMGB.PERIOD_NET_CR,
		 SMGB.PERIOD_NET_DR,
		 SMGB.PERIOD_NUM,
		 SMGB.PERIOD_TYPE,
		 SMGB.PERIOD_YEAR,
		 SMGB.REVALUATION_STATUS,
		 SMGB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		 SMGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG,
		 SMGB.CREATE_DATETIME,
		 SMGB.ACTION_CODE 
	FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_BALANCES SMGB 
	WHERE	SMGB.ACTUAL_FLAG='A' 
	/* AND	(SMGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG IS NULL OR SMGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG='Y') */ /* Commented in CCER OCT FY13 release */
	AND	SMGB.CURRENCY_CODE<>'STAT'
	AND SMGB.GLOBAL_NAME <>'UA'
	) SMOGB 
WHERE	
 ( 
NOT EXISTS (
	SELECT	1 
        FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        WHERE	 SMOGB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		AND	NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = SMOGB.CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
		AND     NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND	NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SMOGB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		AND	NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND	NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                                                         )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT	1
		       FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
		       WHERE	NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE = SMOGB.CURRENCY_CODE
			            AND	 NIC.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01')
)

SELECT RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOGB.GES_PK_ID, SMOGB.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL GL_ACCOUNT_BALANCE_KEY,
SMOGB.GES_PK_ID AS SK_GES_PK_ID_INT ,SMOGB.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD  FROM
( SELECT MOGB.GES_PK_ID,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   FROM 
       (SELECT SMGB.GES_PK_ID, SMGB.GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_BALANCES SMGB
                WHERE 	SMGB.ACTUAL_FLAG='A' 
                /* AND (SMGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG IS NULL OR SMGB.TRANSLATED_FLAG='Y')  */
                AND SMGB.CURRENCY_CODE<>'STAT'
        ) MOGB,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
WHERE MOGB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOGB,
(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (GL_ACCOUNT_BALANCE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GL_ACCOUNT_BALANCE) SGB
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GL_ACCOUNT_BALANCE SGB 
   WHERE SMOGB.GES_PK_ID = SGB.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT AND SMOGB.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SGB.SS_CD)
